subcodes.first_line: O thou who art seeking for Truth! Your letter has been forwarded. I have no opportunity to write a detailed answer... As to life, however, it has had no beginning
subcodes.subjects: @divine philosophy and natural philosophy, @Manifestation of God as gardener; cultivator, @progress only takes place within its own degree, @oneness; unity of religion, @spiritual transformation, @existence and nonexistence; preexistence, @recompense; reward for belief; right action, @evolution; human evolution
